_comment: Random-event definitions (§9). Each event has display text, an optional choices array (a begin-phase popup; absent = auto-apply the begin `effects`), an optional integer `duration` (turns the event persists before its `expire_effects` apply), and effect lists. Trigger predicates that decide WHEN an event fires live in data/event_triggers.json. Effect verbs (read by Events._apply_effect): gold/research/culture (player or capital deltas), tech (free cheapest researchable, or `tech_id`), unit (spawn `count` of `unit_type` at the capital), building (free `structure_id` in the capital), capital_health (delta on the capital's health, used for timed plagues), heal_units (restore every owned unit to full). Magnitudes are fixed integers so applying a choice is deterministic regardless of when the human resolves the popup; only trigger selection draws gs.rng.

ancient_windfall.name: Ancient Windfall
ancient_windfall.text: Prospectors uncover an ancient cache of gold.

founders_monument.name: A Gift of Stone
founders_monument.text: Grateful settlers raise a monument to your founding.

bountiful_harvest.name: Bountiful Harvest
bountiful_harvest.text: A record harvest swells your granaries and your people's pride.

wandering_nomads.name: Wandering Nomads
wandering_nomads.text: A band of nomads asks to settle among your people.

scholarly_visitor.name: A Visiting Scholar
scholarly_visitor.text: A renowned scholar offers to share their learning - for a price.

choices.text: Send them on with a stipend (gain 20 gold)

veteran_recruits.name: Veteran Recruits
veteran_recruits.text: Hardened volunteers, eager to fight, muster at your capital.

great_plague.name: The Great Plague
great_plague.text: A wasting sickness sweeps your capital. It will pass in time.
